---
title: "Emma Wilford"
---

## Emma Wilford

**Dates:** (b.1832/3)

### Description

elder sister of Florence Wilford

### Letters

- Letter from March 16 [1895]
- Letter from Oct 18th 1890
- Letter from October 10, 1890.
- Letter from January 27 [1886]
- Letter from Feb 26th 1880
- Letter from May 6th 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
